examples: Objective to explore the value of center vein catheter thoracostomy in the chemotherapy of malignant pleural effusion.
Methods 3 patients with recalcitrant bronchopleural fistula underwent transsternal transpericardial closure of a bronchopleural fistula and drainage by open thoracostomy.
Objective to evaluate the therapeutic effects and adverse reactions of tube thoracostomy drainage and double-way chemotherapy in treating malignant pleural effusion in geriatric patients.
